title: Player Health Indicators
body:
## Showcase
![Player Health Indicators](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/V4WIozaJ/images/38bb20b09b3b285ac1fce07d5c81a030411fb38b.png)
This is how the health indicators look, but you can visit [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/health/gallery) to see some more cool features

## Description
This texture pack shows the health of any player, but it uses health percentage rather than the actual health. This means that if someone has a base health of 200 hearts and only has 100 hearts remaining, it will show as 5 hearts. Usually while playing the base game then this will most likely always show the actual amount of health.

## How to Use
1. Download and install the texture pack as normal
2. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) if you don't have it
3. Ensure you have [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) in your mods folder
4. Launch your game and apply the texture pack
